name: Butterscotch Haystacks
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the Golden Crisco shortening, peanut butter, and butterscotch chips in a large saucepan over very low heat.
2. Stir constantly until everything is melted and smooth. Remove from heat.
3. Pour the corn flakes into a large bowl.
4. Pour the hot butterscotch mixture over the corn flakes.
5. Stir with a large spoon until the corn flakes are evenly coated.
6. Stir in the chocolate chips.
7. Spoon out the mixture (about 1/4 cup, or 50 mL) into mounds on wax paper-lined baking sheets.
8. Sprinkle with chopped nuts or chocolate sprinkles, if desired.
9. Refrigerate until firm before serving.
Makes 3 dozen 2-1/2 inch cookies
Preparation Time: 15 minutes
Baking Time: No bake
